goal: Add 5 new landing pages (Compare, Vibe Coding, Skills, Methodology, Story) with dropdown header navigation to create a conversion funnel for CodyMaster
decisions: CSS-only dropdown menus (no new JS dependency)
Single tabbed compare page (not separate sub-pages per competitor)
Cross-link to how-to/ guides from relevant pages
Pure static HTML/CSS/JS — matches existing tech stack
Header nav: Problem ▾ | Solution ▾ | Compare | Demo + external links
Mobile menu: accordion groups with expand/collapse toggles
